item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
failed=0
check() {
  label="$1"
  shift
  if "$@"; then
    printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
  else
    printf '"'%s=FAIL\\n' \""'$label"
    failed=1
  fi
}
check json_parse jq -e . "$plan"
check exact_key_set jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan"
check schema_version_integer_1 jq -e '"'(.schema_version == 1) and ((.schema_version | type) == \"number\") and (.schema_version % 1 == 0)' \""'$plan"
check strategy_big_bang jq -e '"'(.strategy == \"big_bang\") and ((.strategy | type) == \"string\")' \""'$plan"
check batch_size_integer_25 jq -e '"'(.batch_size == 25) and ((.batch_size | type) == \"number\") and (.batch_size % 1 == 0)' \""'$plan"
check rollback_error_rate_numeric_0_02 jq -e '"'(.rollback_error_rate == 0.02) and ((.rollback_error_rate | type) == \"number\")' \""'$plan"
check dry_run_first_boolean_true jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first == true) and ((.dry_run_first | type) == \"boolean\")' \""'$plan"
check owner_data_platform jq -e '"'(.owner == \"data-platform\") and ((.owner | type) == \"string\")' \""'$plan"
check legacy_id_exact_in_plan jq -e '"'.safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]' \""'$plan"
check docs_schema rg -F -x -- '"'- Schema version: "'`1`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_strategy rg -F -x -- '"'- Strategy: "'`big_bang`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_batch_size rg -F -x -- '"'- Batch size: "'`25`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_rollback_error_rate rg -F -x -- '"'- Rollback error rate: "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_dry_run_first rg -F -x -- '"'- Dry run first: "'`true`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_owner rg -F -x -- '"'- Owner: "'`data-platform`'"' \""'$docs"
check legacy_id_exact_in_docs rg -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs"
if [ "$failed" -eq 0 ]; then
  printf '"'STRICT_FALLBACK_CHECKER_STATUS=PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'STRICT_FALLBACK_CHECKER_STATUS=FAIL\\n'
fi
printf 'STRICT_FALLBACK_CHECKER_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$failed"
exit "$failed"'

check_pair() {
  json_value=\""'$1"
  docs_line="$2"
  label="$3"
  actual=$(jq -r "$json_value" "$plan")
  rg -F -x -- "$docs_line" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=AGREES (%s)\\n' \""'$label" "$actual"
}
check_pair '"'.schema_version' '- Schema version: "'`1`'"' schema_version
check_pair '.strategy' '- Strategy: "'`big_bang`'"' strategy

check_pair '.dry_run_first' '- Dry run first: "'`true`'"' dry_run_first
check_pair '.owner' '- Owner: "'`data-platform`'"' owner
jq -e '.safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'legacy_id_phase_3=AGREES\\n'
printf 'RECONCILIATION_RESULT=NO_CHANGE_REQUIRED\\n'"

item.aggregated_output:
---
name: semantic-diff
description: AST-node-level diff for file re-reads. Use whenever you'd re-read a file you've read before — returns only the changed AST nodes, not the full file (95.5% measured savings). Bash CLI works on every host; optional MCP server. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust.
effort: low
tools: [Bash, Read]
---

# semantic-diff (semdiff)

## What it does

Maintains a per-session AST snapshot of every file you read through it. On a
re-read of the same file, it returns only the changed nodes (functions, classes,
methods, structs) plus a compact summary of unchanged structure — not the full
file. Tree-sitter under the hood.

Measured on argparse.py (2575 lines, 19,280 tokens unfiltered):
- 2 method edits → 859 tokens returned (95.5% savings).
- No edits, stable re-read → ~100 tokens returned (99.5% savings).

Break-even is the **second** re-read of a file within a session — one-shot reads
gain nothing, so route a file through it only when you expect to read it again.

## Supported languages

Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust (`.py .js .jsx .mjs .ts .tsx .rs`).
Other extensions fall back to a normal full read. Additional grammars by PR.

## Usage — CLI (default, every host)

`./install.sh` wires this automatically. The agent re-reads a file via the
launcher instead of the native Read tool:

```bash
# first read of a file in a session → full contents, caches the AST
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read path/to/file.py --session <id>
# later reads in the same session → only changed nodes + unchanged summary
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read path/to/file.py --session <id>
# drop the session's snapshots to force a fresh full read
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli clear --session <id>
```

Use a stable `--session` per working context (e.g. the task or branch). Add
`--meta` to print mode/counts to stderr. The launcher prefers a skill-local
`.venv` if present, else system `python3`; no MCP, no `cryptography`.

## Usage — MCP (optional, opt-in)

For a native `read_file_smart` tool (Claude Code, etc.) instead of the
Bash CLI — heavier (`mcp` pulls `cryptography` ~24M):

```bash
bash skills/semantic-diff/tools/install.sh --mcp   # installs mcp + registers server
```

Then call `read_file_smart(path, session_id)`, `snapshot_clear(session_id)`,
`snapshot_status(session_id)`. See `tools/semdiff_mcp/server.py` for signatures
and `tools/INSTALL.md` for per-host registration.

## Files

```
tools/
├── semdiff/             # AST diff library (core.py: get_parser slim+fallback)
├── semdiff-cli          # portable Bash launcher (default runtime)
├── semdiff_mcp/         # optional MCP server
├── requirements.txt     # slim CORE: tree-sitter + 4 grammars (~9-18M)
├── requirements-mcp.txt # optional: + mcp/cryptography
├── plugin/              # CC plugin wrapper (.claude-plugin/, .mcp.json)
├── tests/
├── install.sh           # default = slim CLI; --mcp adds the server
└── INSTALL.md           # per-host install
```

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-doc-add --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'
  (.schema_version == 1) and (.schema_version | type) == \"number\" and
  (.strategy == \"big_bang\") and
  (.batch_size == 25) and (.batch_size | type) == \"number\" and
  (.rollback_error_rate == 0.02) and (.rollback_error_rate | type) == \"number\" and
  (.dry_run_first == true) and (.dry_run_first | type) == \"boolean\" and
  (.owner == \"data-platform\") and
  (.safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"])
' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'plan_values_and_types=PASS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'docs_token=PASS %s\\n' \""'$token"
done
plan_phrase_count=$(rg -o -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phrase_count="'$(rg -o -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_phrase_count" = 1
test "$docs_phrase_count" = 1
printf '"'phase3_exact_plan_count=%s PASS\\n' \""'$plan_phrase_count"
printf '"'phase3_exact_docs_count=%s PASS\\n' \""'$docs_phrase_count"
printf '"'POST_EDIT_STATUS=PASS\\n'
printf 'DOCUMENT\\n'
sed -n '1,160p' \""'$docs"'

content.input:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-doc-add --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'
  (.schema_version == 1) and (.schema_version | type) == \"number\" and
  (.strategy == \"big_bang\") and
  (.batch_size == 25) and (.batch_size | type) == \"number\" and
  (.rollback_error_rate == 0.02) and (.rollback_error_rate | type) == \"number\" and
  (.dry_run_first == true) and (.dry_run_first | type) == \"boolean\" and
  (.owner == \"data-platform\") and
  (.safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"])
' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'plan_values_and_types=PASS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'docs_token=PASS %s\\n' \""'$token"
done
plan_phrase_count=$(rg -o -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phrase_count="'$(rg -o -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_phrase_count" = 1
test "$docs_phrase_count" = 1
printf '"'phase3_exact_plan_count=%s PASS\\n' \""'$plan_phrase_count"
printf '"'phase3_exact_docs_count=%s PASS\\n' \""'$docs_phrase_count"
printf '"'POST_EDIT_STATUS=PASS\\n'
printf 'DOCUMENT\\n'
sed -n '1,160p' \""'$docs"'

---
name: subagent-orchestrator
description: Use when dispatching work to subagents — route to cheaper or specialist subagents while keeping final synthesis local.
---

# Subagent Orchestrator

Trigger: task has >3 steps, research, codegen, review, or independent subtasks.

Protocol:
1. `./te delegate plan "<task>"`.
2. Delegate only when saved main-context/tool cost exceeds orchestration overhead.
3. Send subagent minimal context: task, refs, budget, expected output.
4. Require compact packet: outcome, sources, confidence, verification, changed files, risks.
5. Run independent subtasks in parallel only when their outputs are distinct and the merge step stays small.
6. Reject reports that miss contract.
7. Orchestrator keeps final synthesis and final plan authorship.
8. Use any available model family the host provides; do not hardcode Claude/OpenAI/Gemini names into the workflow.
9. If the task repo has a GitHub remote, route save-points to a lightweight repo-maintainer worker using `prompts/subagents/repo-maintainer.prompt.md`.
10. Manage worker lifecycle with `prompts/subagents/lifecycle.prompt.md`: capture result, document/feed it forward, then close completed idle workers.

Result budget:
- summary <= 1500 tokens unless user explicitly requests detail
- no transcripts or raw logs unless needed as evidence
- include URLs/paths instead of pasted source when possible

Never:
- send full transcript
- use reasoning_top for simple extraction
- delegate final synthesis
- run repo maintenance when no GitHub remote exists
- close active workers just to free thread capacity

Protocol:

9. If the task repo has a GitHub remote, route save-points to a lightweight repo-maintainer worker using `prompts/subagents/repo-maintainer.prompt.md`.
10. Manage worker lifecycle with `prompts/subagents/lifecycle.prompt.md`: capture result, document/feed it forward, then close completed idle workers.

Result budget:
- summary <= 1500 tokens unless user explicitly requests detail
- no transcripts or raw logs unless needed as evidence
- include URLs/paths instead of pasted source when possible

- close active workers just to free thread capacity

  },

    "Main agent verifies result and records durable facts after success."
  ],
  "task_class": "hard"
}
# Subagent Lifecycle

Use when supervising spawned workers or when the host reports a thread/subagent limit.

## Close Rule

Close a subagent only when all are true:

1. Its task is complete, failed, cancelled, or superseded.
2. Its final result packet has been read by the orchestrator.
3. Useful results have been fed into the main plan, handoff, or final synthesis.
4. Durable findings have been written to the repo-local wiki/log or explicitly marked non-durable.
5. Open questions, errors, and follow-up tasks have been captured in the task queue or handoff.

Never close an active worker just to free capacity. If a worker is idle but has not returned a result, ask for status or cancel/supersede it explicitly before closing.

## Procedure

1. Poll worker status.
2. For completed workers, read the compact result packet.
3. Verify it satisfies the original contract: scope, sources, confidence, changed paths, commands, errors, and remaining risks.
4. Document durable results with `prompts/subagents/wiki-documenter.prompt.md` when needed.
5. Merge actionable results into the orchestrator's queue/plan.
6. Close the worker thread and record its id, task, result path/wiki link, and close reason.

## If Thread Limit Is Hit

1. Close completed documented workers first.
2. Then close failed/cancelled/superseded workers after capturing failure reason.
3. Do not spawn new workers until there is an available slot.
4. Prefer batching tiny follow-up tasks into one lightweight worker brief.

## Result Ledger

Keep a compact ledger in the active handoff or task queue:

```markdown
| worker | task | status | result captured | wiki/log | close reason |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
```

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-lead-review --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-lead-review --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'LEAD_EXACT_OBJECT\\n'
jq -e '. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"big_bang\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'exact_json_object=PASS\\n'
printf 'LEAD_TYPES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
printf '"'LEAD_DOC_MAPPINGS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'PASS %s\\n' \""'$token"
done
printf '"'LEAD_PHASE_BOUNDARY\\n'
printf 'json_count='
rg -oF 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' '
printf 'docs_count='
rg -oF 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' '
rg -F -x 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3.' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'markdown_terminal_period=CONFIRMED\\n'
printf 'LEAD_INVENTORY\\n'
find \""'$root" -type f | sort
printf '"'LEAD_HASHES\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'LEAD_TIMESTAMPS\\n'
stat -f '%N | mtime=%Sm' -t '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z' \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'LEAD_GIT_STATUS\\n'
set +e
git status --short -- \""'$root" 2>&1
git_rc=$?
printf '"'git_status_exit=%s\\n' \""'$git_rc"
exit 0'

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-current-state --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-current-state --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"big_bang\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'current_plan_exact=PASS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
done
printf '"'current_docs_values=PASS\\n'
plan_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_count" = 1 && test "$docs_count" = 1
printf '"'current_phase3_counts=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_count" "$docs_count"
printf '"'current_hashes\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'CURRENT_STATE_COMPARISON=PASS\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-canary-replace --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-canary-replace --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'plan_exact_canary_state=PASS\\n'
rg -F '"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'docs_canary=PASS\\n'
if rg -n 'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
rg -F 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
jq -e '"'.rollback_error_rate == 0.02' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'rollback_error_rate_preserved=PASS\\n'
plan_phase_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_phase_count" = 1 && test "$docs_phase_count" = 1
printf '"'phase3_preservation=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"
printf '"'POST_REPLACEMENT_STATUS=PASS\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
printf 'OFFICIAL_CHECKER_ATTEMPT\\n'
migration-checker \""'$root" 2>&1
official_rc=$?
printf '"'OFFICIAL_MIGRATION_CHECKER_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$official_rc"
printf '"'STRICT_FULL_FALLBACK\\n'
failed=0
passfail() {
  label=\""'$1"
  shift
  if "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
  else
    printf '"'%s=FAIL\\n' \""'$label"
    failed=1
  fi
}
passfail inventory_exactly_two test "$(find "$root" -type f | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')\" = 2
passfail json_parse jq -e . \""'$plan"
passfail exact_key_set jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan"
passfail schema_version_integer_1 jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1' \""'$plan"
passfail strategy_canary jq -e '"'(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan"
passfail batch_size_integer_25 jq -e '"'(.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25' \""'$plan"
passfail rollback_error_rate_number_0_02 jq -e '"'(.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan"
passfail dry_run_first_boolean_true jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true' \""'$plan"
passfail owner_exact_data_platform jq -e '"'(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"data-platform\"' \""'$plan"
passfail phase3_json_exact jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan"
passfail docs_schema rg -F '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' \""'$docs"
passfail docs_strategy rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs"
passfail docs_batch rg -F '"'batch size "'`25`'"' \""'$docs"
passfail docs_rollback rg -F '"'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs"
passfail docs_dry_run rg -F '"'"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \""'$docs"
passfail docs_owner rg -F '"'owner is "'`data-platform`'"' \""'$docs"
passfail phase3_docs_whole_line rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs"
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
else
  printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
canary_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'canary' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
if [ \""'$canary_count" = 2 ]; then
  printf '"'canary_occurrences_exactly_two=PASS count=%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"
else
  printf '"'canary_occurrences_exactly_two=FAIL count=%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"
  failed=1
fi
plan_phrase_count=$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phrase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
if [ \""'$plan_phrase_count" = 1 ] && [ "$docs_phrase_count" = 1 ]; then
  printf '"'phase3_occurrences=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phrase_count" "$docs_phrase_count"
else
  printf '"'phase3_occurrences=FAIL plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phrase_count" "$docs_phrase_count"
  failed=1
fi
printf '"'PLAN_SHA256='
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" | awk '"'{print "'$1}'"'
printf 'DOCS_SHA256='
shasum -a 256 \""'$docs" | awk '"'{print "'$1}'"'
printf 'STRICT_FULL_MIGRATION_CHECK_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$failed"
exit 0'

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-lead-evidence-replacement --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-lead-evidence-replacement --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'lead_current_plan=PASS\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"strategy\",(.strategy|type),.strategy]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"owner\",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
for pair in '"\\
  'schema_version|Schema version "'`1`'"' \\
  'strategy|"'`canary` strategy'"' \\
  'batch_size|batch size "'`25`'"' \\
  'rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \\
  'dry_run_first|"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  'owner|owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'lead_docs_%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'lead_phase3_exact_both=PASS\\n'
if rg -n -uu 'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'lead_abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'lead_abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
printf 'lead_current_hashes\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'LEAD_EVIDENCE_REPLACEMENT=PASS\\n'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
printf '"'CURRENT_PLAN\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-latest-resume --meta
printf '"'CURRENT_DOCS\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$docs" --session scenario-06-latest-resume --meta
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
for token in '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`canary` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
done
rg -F -x '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'LATEST_ARTIFACT_ANCHOR=PASS\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-final-five-checks --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-final-five-checks --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'STRATEGY\\n'
jq -e '(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'strategy=PASS current:canary abandoned:0\\n'
printf 'NUMERIC_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1 and (.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25 and (.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'numeric_values=PASS\\n'
printf 'PHASE_BOUNDARY\\n'
jq -e --arg phrase \""'$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
plan_phase_count=$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_phase_count" = 1 && test "$docs_phase_count" = 1
printf '"'phase_boundary=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"
printf '"'DOCS_AGREEMENT\\n'
for pair in \\
  'schema_version|Schema version "'`1`'"' \\
  'strategy|"'`canary` strategy'"' \\
  'batch_size|batch size "'`25`'"' \\
  'rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \\
  'dry_run_first|"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  'owner|owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
printf '"'docs_agreement=PASS\\n'
printf 'ARTIFACT_INVENTORY\\n'
actual="'$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$actual" = "$expected"
printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$actual"
printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
printf 'FINAL_REQUESTED_CHECKS_EXIT=0\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-owner-supersession --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-owner-supersession --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'plan_exact_post_owner_state=PASS\\n'
for pair in \\
  'schema_version|Schema version "'`1`'"' \\
  'strategy|"'`canary` strategy'"' \\
  'batch_size|batch size "'`25`'"' \\
  'rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \\
  'dry_run_first|"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  'owner|owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'docs_%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'phase3_exact_unchanged=PASS\\n'
if rg -n -uu 'data-platform' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'superseded_owner_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'superseded_owner_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
if rg -n -uu 'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
printf 'OWNER_ONLY_DECISION_UPDATE=PASS\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
printf 'OFFICIAL_CHECKER\\n'
migration-checker \""'$root" 2>&1
official_rc=$?
printf '"'OFFICIAL_MIGRATION_CHECKER_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$official_rc"
printf '"'STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE\\n'
failed=0
check() {
  label=\""'$1"
  shift
  if "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
  else
    printf '"'%s=FAIL\\n' \""'$label"
    failed=1
  fi
}
check json_parse jq -e . "$plan"
check exact_key_set jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan"
check exact_current_object jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan"
check schema_version_integer_1 jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0 and .schema_version==1' \""'$plan"
check strategy_string_canary jq -e '"'(.strategy|type)==\"string\" and .strategy==\"canary\"' \""'$plan"
check batch_size_integer_25 jq -e '"'(.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0 and .batch_size==25' \""'$plan"
check rollback_error_rate_number_0_02 jq -e '"'(.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and .rollback_error_rate==0.02' \""'$plan"
check dry_run_first_boolean_true jq -e '"'(.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true' \""'$plan"
check owner_string_platform_migrations jq -e '"'(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"platform-migrations\"' \""'$plan"
check phase3_json_exact jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan"
check docs_schema rg -F '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_strategy rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_batch_size rg -F '"'batch size "'`25`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_rollback_error_rate rg -F '"'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_dry_run_first rg -F '"'"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \""'$docs"
check docs_owner rg -F '"'owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"' \""'$docs"
check phase3_docs_whole_line rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs"
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '"'abandoned_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
else
  printf 'abandoned_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
if rg -n -uu 'data-platform' \""'$root" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '"'superseded_owner_absent=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
else
  printf 'superseded_owner_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
canary_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'canary' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
owner_count="'$(rg -o -uu '"'platform-migrations' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
plan_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_phase_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
if [ \""'$canary_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'canary_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; else printf '"'canary_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$canary_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$owner_count" = 2 ]; then printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=PASS count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; else printf '"'current_owner_occurrences=FAIL count:%s\\n' \""'$owner_count"; failed=1; fi
if [ "$plan_phase_count" = 1 ] && [ "$docs_phase_count" = 1 ]; then printf '"'phase3_occurrences=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; else printf '"'phase3_occurrences=FAIL plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_phase_count" "$docs_phase_count"; failed=1; fi
actual=$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
if [ \""'$actual" = "$expected" ]; then
  printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
  printf '%s\\n' \""'$actual"
else
  printf '"'artifact_inventory=FAIL\\n'
  failed=1
fi
printf 'CURRENT_TYPES_AND_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"strategy\",(.strategy|type),.strategy]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"owner\",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv)'
 \""'$plan" 2>/dev/null
jq_types_rc=$?
if [ "$jq_types_rc" -ne 0 ]; then printf '"'type_output_command=FAIL\\n'; failed=1; fi
printf 'CURRENT_HASHES\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'STRICT_CURRENT_STATE_SUITE_EXIT=%s\\n' \""'$failed"
exit 0'

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-final-independent-delegate-check --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-final-independent-delegate-check --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'SOURCES\\n%s\\n%s\\n' \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'CURRENT_DECISIONS_AND_TYPES\\n'
jq -r '([\""'$.schema_version",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), (["$.strategy",(.strategy|type),.strategy]|@tsv), (["$.batch_size",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), (["$.rollback_error_rate",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), (["$.dry_run_first",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv), (["$.owner",(.owner|type),.owner]|@tsv), (["$.safety_conditions[0]",(.safety_conditions[0]|type),.safety_conditions[0]]|@tsv)'"' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'exact_current_json=PASS\\n'
printf 'CURRENT_DOC_DECISION_MATCHES\\n'
for pair in \\
  '"'$.schema_version|Schema version `1`'"' \\
  '"'$.strategy|`canary` strategy'"' \\
  '"'$.batch_size|batch size `25`'"' \\
  '"'$.rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate `0.02`'"' \\
  '"'$.dry_run_first|`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  '"'$.owner|owner is `platform-migrations`'"' \\
  '"'$.safety_conditions[0]|legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'"'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
plan_count=$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_count" = 1 && test "$docs_count" = 1
printf '"'phase3_counts=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_count" "$docs_count"
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang|data-platform' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'superseded_values_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'superseded_values_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
actual="'$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$actual" = "$expected"
printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2\\n'
printf 'CURRENT_HASHES\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'FINAL_INDEPENDENT_DECISION_COMPARISON_EXIT=0\\n'"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
printf 'FINAL_PLAN\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-all-active-requests --meta
printf '"'FINAL_DOCS\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$docs" --session scenario-06-all-active-requests --meta
printf '"'ACTIVE_REQUIREMENT_VERDICTS\\n'
jq -e '.schema_version==1 and (.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.schema_version % 1)==0' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'schema_version_integer_1=PASS\\n'
jq -e '.strategy==\"canary\" and (.strategy|type)==\"string\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'strategy_canary_both=PASS\\n'
jq -e '.batch_size==25 and (.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size % 1)==0' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'batch size "'`25`'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'batch_size_integer_25_both=PASS\\n'
jq -e '.rollback_error_rate==0.02 and (.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'rollback_error_rate_number_0_02_both=PASS\\n'
jq -e '.dry_run_first==true and (.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'dry_run_first_boolean_true_both=PASS\\n'
jq -e '.owner==\"platform-migrations\" and (.owner|type)==\"string\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'owner_platform_migrations_both=PASS\\n'
jq -e --arg phrase \""'$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
plan_count=$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_count" = 1 && test "$docs_count" = 1
printf '"'phase3_exact_boundary_both=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_count" "$docs_count"
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'exact_current_plan_object=PASS\\n'
if rg -n -uu 'big_bang|big-bang|data-platform' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'superseded_values_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'superseded_values_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
actual="'$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$actual" = "$expected"
printf '"'artifact_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
printf 'ALL_ACTIVE_REQUESTS_EXIT=0\\n'"
